name: Base economy
description: The base economy table. Defines the universe-average baseline against which the economy engine perturbs per-location prices. This file is a stub: the schema for economy tables has not yet landed (the framework README says these kinds only need to parse). Shape is intentionally conservative — goods, production chains, and a baseline price table — so the system that consumes this can iterate without breaking loaded data.

production_chains.notes: The simplest production chain. Two units of raw ore become one unit of refined alloys. The smelter is the facility; the chain is the operation.

Hydroponics produces rations from labour and water, not from an input good. The chain takes no good input — only the facility. Future economy work may add a water good or a labour abstraction; this chain is shaped to absorb either additively.
